role_title: Associate Manager, Marketplace - Restaurant Growth Strategy & Operations

location.office_time_required: unclear — hybrid model balancing in-person collaboration with remote work

level_signals: 4-6+ years of experience in a problem-solving role
Title is Associate Manager — IC contributor with broad ownership
Comp range $105,400–$155,000 base, consistent with mid-senior IC at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4-6+ years of experience in a problem-solving role (consulting, tech, banking).
You have an extreme sense of ownership — you never shy away from tackling ambiguous problems and can motivate teammates to go above and beyond.
You solve problems from first principles and resist "this is how it's always been done" thinking.
You thrive with a diverse set of responsibilities and love working across teams and disciplines.
You're an analytical powerhouse — you let data win arguments and are comfortable pulling your own data in SQL and modeling in Excel.
You're a collaborator with experience managing stakeholders across diverse audiences, from front-line doers to senior executives.

scope.surface: US Marketplace Strategy & Operations — Restaurant Growth (selection, merchandising, merchant partnerships, product commercialization)
scope.business_model: marketplace / platform, B2B2C (restaurant partners + consumers + Dashers)
primary_metrics_inferred: Top-line and bottom-line performance of core marketplace business
core_responsibilities: Define and execute DoorDash's restaurant strategy
Launch new restaurant selection and in-app merchandising enhancements
Commercialize products that help restaurant partners grow on DoorDash
Create sustainable value for restaurants, consumers, and Dashers while unlocking incremental marketplace revenue
Run a sustainable marketplace business line with broad impact

green_flags: Equity grants included in compensation package
Comprehensive benefits disclosed (401k match, parental leave, wellness, etc.)
Clear ownership and scope described for the role
Cross-functional exposure to Product, Analytics, Finance, Marketing, Sales
red_flags: No cities listed for the hybrid role — unclear which offices are relevant or required for in-person collaboration
Location pay differential mentioned but no breakdown by city/region provided
JD mentions Covey AEDT tool usage for NYC roles — candidates in NYC should be aware of automated screening
